name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkAttributes
summary: The SectionMarkAttributes class is the attributes class for section marks.

constructors.name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new default SectionMarkAttributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: SectionMarkBase.SectionMarkAttributes(String)
constructors.summary: Creates a new SectionMarkAttributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

params.name: attributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: LeftSymbol
properties.summary: The symbol to use on the left side of the section mark.

properties.name: LineColor
properties.summary: The color of the section mark line (see DrawingColors for options).

properties.name: LineLength
properties.summary: The length of the section mark lines.

properties.name: LineLengthOffset
properties.summary: The offset from the end of the line on both sides of the section mark.

properties.name: LineWidth
properties.summary: The width of the section mark lines.

properties.name: LineWidthOffsetLeft
properties.summary: The offset from the start of the line on the left side of the section mark.

properties.name: LineWidthOffsetRight
properties.summary: The offset from the start of the line on the right side of the section mark.

properties.name: RightSymbol
properties.summary: The symbol to use on the right side of the section mark.

properties.name: SymbolColor
properties.summary: The color of the mark symbols (see DrawingColors for options).

properties.name: TagsAttributes
properties.summary: The tags A1-A5 in the section mark attributes.

properties.name: TrueLineColor
properties.summary: The true color (rgb enabled) of the line.

properties.name: TrueSymbolColor
properties.summary: The true color (rgb enabled) of the symbol.
